seoTitle: Samxon Aluminum Electrolytic Capacitors Product Catalog | BeiLuo Electronics
seoDescription: Browse Samxon aluminum electrolytic capacitors, snap-in capacitors, SMD capacitors, and radial lead capacitors. Technical specifications, selection guide, and alternative parts.

faqs.question: How do I select the right Samxon capacitor for my application?
faqs.answer: Consider these key parameters: rated voltage (1.2-1.5x operating voltage), capacitance value, ripple current requirements, operating temperature range, physical dimensions, and application type (LED, power supply, automotive).
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact our FAE team with your application specifications for personalized capacitor selection assistance.

faqs.question: What is the difference between snap-in and radial lead capacitors?
faqs.answer: Snap-in capacitors have larger capacitance and voltage ratings with PCB mounting terminals, suitable for high-power applications. Radial lead capacitors are smaller with wire leads, ideal for compact designs and lower power applications.
faqs.decisionGuide: Use snap-in capacitors for power supplies above 100W. Use radial lead capacitors for compact designs and lower power applications.

faqs.question: What are the typical applications for SMD aluminum capacitors?
faqs.answer: SMD aluminum capacitors are used in compact electronic devices, portable equipment, and space-constrained designs where through-hole mounting is not feasible. Common applications include adapters, chargers, and small power supplies.
faqs.decisionGuide: For compact designs requiring automated assembly, select SMD capacitors with appropriate capacitance and voltage ratings.

faqs.question: Are Samxon capacitors RoHS compliant?
faqs.answer: Yes, all Samxon capacitors are RoHS compliant and free from lead, mercury, cadmium, and other restricted substances. Certificates of compliance are available upon request.
faqs.decisionGuide: For RoHS compliance documentation, contact our sales team with your specific part numbers.

faqs.question: What is the lead time for Samxon capacitors?
faqs.answer: Standard products typically have 4-6 weeks lead time. High-volume or custom products may require 8-12 weeks. We maintain inventory of popular models for faster delivery.
faqs.decisionGuide: For urgent requirements, check our stock availability or discuss scheduled orders with our sales team.

categories.name: Snap-in Capacitors
categories.description: High-capacitance snap-in aluminum electrolytic capacitors for SMPS and LED drivers
categories.longDescription: Samxon snap-in capacitors are designed for high-power applications requiring large capacitance values and high ripple current capability. These capacitors feature easy PCB mounting with snap-in terminals and are ideal for switch-mode power supplies, LED drivers, and industrial power applications. Contact BeiLuo Electronics, your authorized Samxon distributor, for capacitor selection guidance.
categories.selectionGuide: Select based on voltage rating, capacitance, ripple current, and lifetime requirements. HP series for high performance, HM for general purpose.

faqs.question: What are the advantages of snap-in capacitors?
faqs.answer: Snap-in capacitors offer high capacitance values (up to 68,000uF), high voltage ratings (up to 500V), and high ripple current capability. The snap-in terminals enable secure PCB mounting and easy assembly.
faqs.decisionGuide: For power supplies above 100W requiring high capacitance, snap-in capacitors are the optimal choice.

faqs.question: What mounting orientation is recommended for snap-in capacitors?
faqs.answer: Vertical mounting with terminals down is recommended for optimal heat dissipation. Ensure adequate clearance around the capacitor for heat dissipation. For more detailed information and application guidance, please consult the product datasheet or contact our technical support team.
faqs.decisionGuide: Mount vertically with proper ventilation. Consider forced air cooling for high ripple current applications.

faqs.question: Can snap-in capacitors be used in parallel?
faqs.answer: Yes, snap-in capacitors can be connected in parallel to increase total capacitance and share ripple current. Ensure balanced current sharing with symmetrical PCB layout. For more detailed information and application guidance, please consult the product datasheet or contact our technical support team.
faqs.decisionGuide: For parallel connection, use identical part numbers and keep trace lengths equal for balanced current sharing.

faqs.question: What is the expected lifetime of snap-in capacitors?
faqs.answer: Samxon snap-in capacitors are rated for 2,000 to 15,000 hours at rated temperature. Lifetime doubles for every 10C reduction in operating temperature. For more detailed information and application guidance, please consult the product datasheet or contact our technical support team.
faqs.decisionGuide: For extended lifetime, operate at lower temperatures and voltages. Use lifetime calculation formulas for accurate estimation.

faqs.question: Are snap-in capacitors suitable for LED driver applications?
faqs.answer: Yes, Samxon snap-in capacitors are widely used in LED drivers due to their high ripple current capability and long lifetime options. Select capacitors with appropriate lifetime ratings for your LED application.
faqs.decisionGuide: For LED drivers, select capacitors with 8,000+ hour lifetime ratings and sufficient ripple current capability.

faqs.question: What is the ripple current rating of snap-in capacitors?
faqs.answer: Ripple current ratings range from 2A to 20A depending on capacitance, voltage, and case size. Higher capacitance and larger cases typically offer higher ripple current capability. For more detailed information and application guidance, please consult the product datasheet or contact our technical support team.
faqs.decisionGuide: Select capacitors with ripple current ratings at least 1.5x your application requirements for reliable operation.

products.name: Snap-in Capacitor 10000uF 400V
products.shortDescription: High-performance snap-in capacitor with 10000uF capacitance and 400V rating for high-power applications.
descriptionParagraphs: The HP-10000uF-400V is a high-performance snap-in aluminum electrolytic capacitor designed for demanding power supply and LED driver applications. With 10000uF capacitance and 400V rating, it provides excellent filtering capability for high-power DC bus circuits.

This capacitor features a robust cylindrical aluminum case with snap-in terminals for secure PCB mounting. The high-purity electrolyte and optimized electrode design deliver low ESR and high ripple current capability of up to 8.5A at 105C.

Rated for 15,000 hours at 105C, this capacitor ensures long-term reliability in industrial and commercial applications. The -25C to +105C temperature range suits most indoor power supply applications.
products.faeReview: The HP-10000uF-400V is my go-to recommendation for 200-400W LED drivers and power supplies. The 10000uF/400V rating hits the sweet spot for PFC output filtering in this power range. In my experience, the actual ripple current capability often exceeds the datasheet rating by 10-15% due to Samxon's conservative specifications. The snap-in terminals provide reliable mounting even under vibration conditions. For LED applications, I recommend operating at 350V or less to extend lifetime significantly. The 35mm diameter case size is a standard footprint, making replacement easy.

alternativeParts.comparison: Voltage: 400V same; Capacitance: 6800uF vs 10000uF; Ripple Current: 6.8A vs 8.5A
alternativeParts.useCase: Use for applications where 6800uF provides sufficient filtering

alternativeParts.comparison: Voltage: 400V same; Capacitance: 15000uF vs 10000uF; Ripple Current: 10.5A vs 8.5A
alternativeParts.useCase: Use for applications requiring lower ripple voltage

companionParts.description: SMD capacitor for control circuit decoupling
Safety discharge resistor for capacitor bank

applicationScenarios.description: PFC output capacitor for high-power LED driver
applicationScenarios.configuration: Single capacitor after PFC boost stage

faqs.question: What is the maximum ripple current for the HP-10000uF-400V?
faqs.answer: The rated ripple current is 8.5A at 105C and 120Hz. This rating ensures reliable operation in power supply applications with moderate switching frequencies. At lower temperatures, the capacitor can handle higher ripple currents - approximately 10.2A at 85C. For high-frequency applications above 100kHz, the effective ripple current capability may be reduced due to increased ESR. Always verify the actual operating temperature and frequency conditions in your application to ensure the capacitor operates within its safe operating area.
faqs.decisionGuide: For applications exceeding 8.5A ripple current, consider using multiple capacitors in parallel or upgrading to a higher capacitance model. Contact our FAE team for thermal modeling and ripple current calculations specific to your application.

faqs.question: What is the expected lifetime of the HP-10000uF-400V at typical operating conditions?
faqs.answer: The rated lifetime is 15,000 hours at 105C. Using the Arrhenius equation, we can calculate the expected lifetime at different operating temperatures. At 65C, the expected lifetime extends to 240,000 hours. At 45C, lifetime increases to 960,000 hours. At 25C ambient, you can achieve up to 3,840,000 hours. Every 10C reduction in operating temperature approximately doubles the capacitor lifetime. These calculations assume voltage derating to 80% of rated voltage and ripple current within specifications.
faqs.decisionGuide: For maximum capacitor lifetime, operate at the lowest practical temperature with 80% voltage derating. Contact our FAE team for lifetime calculations specific to your application conditions.

faqs.question: What voltage derating is recommended for reliable operation of the HP-10000uF-400V?
faqs.answer: Industry best practice recommends operating aluminum electrolytic capacitors at no more than 80% of their rated voltage. For this 400V rated capacitor, the maximum recommended operating voltage is 320V. This 20% derating significantly improves reliability and extends operational lifetime. For critical applications or high-temperature environments, 50% derating is recommended, limiting operating voltage to 200V. The voltage derating also provides margin for voltage transients and line regulation variations. Operating above 80% of rated voltage will significantly reduce capacitor lifetime.
faqs.decisionGuide: Design your circuit to operate the capacitor at 80% or less of rated voltage for optimal reliability. Contact our FAE team for voltage derating recommendations specific to your application requirements.

faqs.question: What is the operating temperature range of the HP-10000uF-400V and how does it affect performance?
faqs.answer: This capacitor is rated for operation from -25C to +105C. At the maximum rated temperature of 105C, the capacitor achieves its rated lifetime of 15,000 hours. As operating temperature decreases, capacitor lifetime increases exponentially following the Arrhenius relationship - approximately doubling for every 10C reduction. Capacitance and ESR also vary with temperature, with capacitance typically increasing 10-15% at low temperatures and decreasing slightly at high temperatures. ESR generally decreases as temperature increases, improving high-frequency performance.
faqs.decisionGuide: For extended capacitor lifetime, minimize operating temperature through proper thermal design and ventilation. Contact our FAE team for thermal management recommendations specific to your application.

faqs.question: What is the ESR of the HP-10000uF-400V and how does it affect circuit performance?
faqs.answer: The Equivalent Series Resistance (ESR) at 100Hz is approximately 0.00 Ohm. ESR represents the resistive losses in the capacitor and directly affects ripple voltage, power dissipation, and filtering effectiveness. Lower ESR results in lower ripple voltage for a given ripple current, reduced self-heating, and improved filtering at high frequencies. This capacitor's ESR characteristics make it suitable for switching power supplies and industrial controls. ESR typically decreases with increasing temperature and increases at higher frequencies. For switching power supplies operating at 100kHz, consider the frequency characteristics of ESR.
faqs.decisionGuide: For applications requiring lower ESR, consider our low-impedance series or connect multiple capacitors in parallel. Contact our FAE team for ESR optimization recommendations.

faqs.question: Can multiple HP-10000uF-400V capacitors be connected in parallel for increased capability?
faqs.answer: Yes, multiple capacitors can be connected in parallel to increase total capacitance and share ripple current. When connecting HP-10000uF-400V in parallel, the total capacitance adds linearly while ESR reduces proportionally. For example, two capacitors in parallel provide 20000uF capacitance and approximately 0.000 Ohm ESR (half the single capacitor ESR). This configuration also improves ripple current capability to 17.0A. Important considerations include: using identical part numbers for balanced current sharing, maintaining symmetrical PCB layout, ensuring adequate spacing for thermal management, and verifying the total inrush current doesn't exceed circuit limitations.
faqs.decisionGuide: For high-current applications, consider parallel connection of multiple capacitors. Contact our FAE team for parallel capacitor bank design assistance and current sharing analysis.

products.name: Snap-in Capacitor 4700uF 200V
products.shortDescription: General-purpose snap-in capacitor with 4700uF capacitance and 200V rating for cost-effective designs.
descriptionParagraphs: The HM-4700uF-200V is a general-purpose snap-in aluminum electrolytic capacitor designed for cost-sensitive power supply applications. With 4700uF capacitance and 200V rating, it provides reliable filtering for low to medium power DC bus circuits.

This capacitor offers good ripple current capability of 4.2A at 105C, suitable for power supplies up to 200W. The compact 25mm diameter case with snap-in terminals enables easy PCB mounting in space-constrained designs.

Rated for 8,000 hours at 105C, this capacitor provides reliable operation for consumer and industrial applications with moderate lifetime requirements. The cost-effective design makes it ideal for high-volume production.
products.faeReview: The HM-4700uF-200V is perfect for cost-sensitive consumer power supplies and LED drivers in the 100-150W range. I frequently recommend this part for adapter and charger applications where cost is critical. The 4700uF value works well for PFC output filtering in 100-150W power supplies. The compact 25mm diameter is ideal for space-constrained designs. One tip: for higher reliability, I suggest running at 160-170V DC rather than the full 200V rating - this can extend lifetime by 30-40%. The snap-in terminals make assembly straightforward on automated production lines.

alternativeParts.comparison: Voltage: 200V same; Capacitance: 3300uF vs 4700uF; Ripple Current: 3.5A vs 4.2A
alternativeParts.useCase: Use for applications where 3300uF provides sufficient filtering

alternativeParts.comparison: Voltage: 200V same; Capacitance: 6800uF vs 4700uF; Ripple Current: 5.8A vs 4.2A; Lifetime: 15000h vs 8000h
alternativeParts.useCase: Use for applications requiring longer lifetime and higher ripple current

categories.name: Radial Lead Capacitors
categories.description: Standard radial lead aluminum electrolytic capacitors for general-purpose applications
categories.longDescription: Samxon radial lead capacitors are the industry standard for general-purpose aluminum electrolytic capacitors. These capacitors feature wire leads for through-hole mounting and are available in a wide range of capacitance and voltage ratings. Ideal for consumer electronics, power supplies, and industrial applications where compact size and cost-effectiveness are important. Contact BeiLuo Electronics, your authorized Samxon distributor, for radial capacitor selection guidance.
categories.selectionGuide: Select based on capacitance, voltage rating, size constraints, and lifetime requirements. RS series for standard, RH for high temperature.

faqs.question: What are the typical applications for Radial Lead Capacitors?
faqs.answer: Radial Lead Capacitors are widely used in power supplies, industrial controls, consumer electronics, and automotive applications. They provide reliable energy storage, filtering, and decoupling functions. The specific application depends on the capacitance value, voltage rating, and package type selected.
faqs.decisionGuide: Browse our product catalog to find the right Radial Lead Capacitors for your application, or contact our FAE team for selection assistance.

faqs.question: How do I select the right Radial Lead Capacitors for my design?
faqs.answer: When selecting Radial Lead Capacitors, consider these key parameters: voltage rating (with 20-50% derating), capacitance value, ripple current requirements, temperature range, lifetime requirements, and physical size constraints. Also evaluate ESR characteristics for high-frequency applications and consider the mounting style for your PCB design.
faqs.decisionGuide: Use our online selection guide or contact our FAE team with your specifications for personalized recommendations.

faqs.question: What is the typical lifetime of Radial Lead Capacitors?
faqs.answer: The lifetime of Radial Lead Capacitors varies by series and operating conditions. Standard series typically offer 2,000 to 5,000 hours at rated temperature, while high-temperature series can provide 10,000 hours or more. Actual lifetime depends heavily on operating temperature and voltage derating - following the Arrhenius relationship where every 10C reduction doubles the lifetime.
faqs.decisionGuide: For specific lifetime calculations based on your operating conditions, contact our FAE team.

faqs.question: Are Radial Lead Capacitors RoHS compliant and environmentally friendly?
faqs.answer: Yes, all Radial Lead Capacitors are RoHS compliant and free from lead, mercury, cadmium, and other restricted substances. They meet international environmental standards and are suitable for worldwide distribution. Some series are also available with halogen-free options for enhanced environmental compliance.
faqs.decisionGuide: For specific environmental compliance documentation, contact our sales team with your part numbers.

faqs.question: What mounting options are available for Radial Lead Capacitors?
faqs.answer: Radial Lead Capacitors are available in various mounting configurations including through-hole radial leads for PCB mounting, snap-in terminals for high-power applications, and screw terminals for very high capacitance values. The mounting style should be selected based on the mechanical requirements, current handling, and serviceability needs of your application.
faqs.decisionGuide: Review our mounting guidelines or contact our FAE team for recommendations on the best mounting style for your application.

faqs.question: How do ripple current and ESR affect Radial Lead Capacitors performance?
faqs.answer: Ripple current and ESR are critical parameters that affect capacitor heating and filtering performance. Higher ripple current causes increased self-heating due to I²R losses in the ESR. Lower ESR results in better filtering, lower ripple voltage, and reduced heating. When selecting Radial Lead Capacitors, ensure the ripple current rating exceeds your application requirements by at least 1.5x for reliable operation.
faqs.decisionGuide: For help calculating ripple current requirements and ESR specifications, contact our FAE team.

products.name: Radial Capacitor 1000uF 25V
products.shortDescription: Standard radial capacitor with 1000uF capacitance and 25V rating for general-purpose applications.
descriptionParagraphs: The RS-1000uF-25V is a standard radial aluminum electrolytic capacitor designed for general-purpose applications. With 1000uF capacitance and 25V rating, it provides reliable filtering and decoupling for low-voltage circuits.
This capacitor features a compact 10mm diameter case with 5mm lead spacing, making it ideal for space-constrained designs. The standard radial form factor enables easy through-hole mounting on PCBs.

Rated for 2000 hours at 85C, this capacitor is suitable for consumer electronics and industrial applications with standard lifetime requirements. The cost-effective design makes it ideal for high-volume production.
products.faeReview: The RS-1000uF-25V is my standard recommendation for low-voltage filtering applications. The 1000uF/25V rating is perfect for 12V and 5V power supply output filtering. The compact 10mm size fits in most designs, and the 5mm lead spacing is compatible with standard PCB layouts. For consumer electronics where cost is critical, this capacitor offers excellent value. I recommend keeping the operating voltage below 20V for extended lifetime.

This capacitor's ESR characteristics make it suitable for switching power supplies and industrial controls. ESR typically decreases with increasing temperature and increases at higher frequencies. For switching power supplies operating at 100kHz, consider the frequency characteristics of ESR.
faqs.decisionGuide: For applications requiring lower ESR, consider our low-impedance series or connect multiple capacitors in parallel. Contact our FAE team for ESR optimization recommendations.

faqs.question: Can multiple RS-470uF-50V capacitors be connected in parallel for increased capability?
faqs.answer: Yes, multiple capacitors can be connected in parallel to increase total capacitance and share ripple current. When connecting RS-470uF-50V in parallel, the total capacitance adds linearly while ESR reduces proportionally. For example, two capacitors in parallel provide 940uF capacitance and approximately 0.010 Ohm ESR (half the single capacitor ESR). This configuration also improves ripple current capability to 1.8A. Important considerations include: using identical part numbers for balanced current sharing, maintaining symmetrical PCB layout, ensuring adequate spacing for thermal management, and verifying the total inrush current doesn't exceed circuit limitations.
faqs.decisionGuide: For high-current applications, consider parallel connection of multiple capacitors. Contact our FAE team for parallel capacitor bank design assistance and current sharing analysis.

categories.name: SMD Aluminum Capacitors
categories.description: Surface-mount aluminum electrolytic capacitors for compact and automated assembly
categories.longDescription: Samxon SMD aluminum electrolytic capacitors are designed for automated surface-mount assembly and compact electronic designs. These capacitors feature surface-mount terminals and are ideal for portable devices, adapters, and high-density PCBs where through-hole mounting is not feasible. Contact BeiLuo Electronics for SMD capacitor selection.
categories.selectionGuide: Select based on capacitance, voltage, size constraints, and reflow soldering compatibility. VT series for standard, VH for high temperature.

faqs.question: What are the typical applications for SMD Aluminum Capacitors?
faqs.answer: SMD Aluminum Capacitors are widely used in power supplies, industrial controls, consumer electronics, and automotive applications. They provide reliable energy storage, filtering, and decoupling functions. The specific application depends on the capacitance value, voltage rating, and package type selected.
faqs.decisionGuide: Browse our product catalog to find the right SMD Aluminum Capacitors for your application, or contact our FAE team for selection assistance.

faqs.question: How do I select the right SMD Aluminum Capacitors for my design?
faqs.answer: When selecting SMD Aluminum Capacitors, consider these key parameters: voltage rating (with 20-50% derating), capacitance value, ripple current requirements, temperature range, lifetime requirements, and physical size constraints. Also evaluate ESR characteristics for high-frequency applications and consider the mounting style for your PCB design.
faqs.decisionGuide: Use our online selection guide or contact our FAE team with your specifications for personalized recommendations.

faqs.question: What is the typical lifetime of SMD Aluminum Capacitors?
faqs.answer: The lifetime of SMD Aluminum Capacitors varies by series and operating conditions. Standard series typically offer 2,000 to 5,000 hours at rated temperature, while high-temperature series can provide 10,000 hours or more. Actual lifetime depends heavily on operating temperature and voltage derating - following the Arrhenius relationship where every 10C reduction doubles the lifetime.
faqs.decisionGuide: For specific lifetime calculations based on your operating conditions, contact our FAE team.

faqs.question: Are SMD Aluminum Capacitors RoHS compliant and environmentally friendly?
faqs.answer: Yes, all SMD Aluminum Capacitors are RoHS compliant and free from lead, mercury, cadmium, and other restricted substances. They meet international environmental standards and are suitable for worldwide distribution. Some series are also available with halogen-free options for enhanced environmental compliance.
faqs.decisionGuide: For specific environmental compliance documentation, contact our sales team with your part numbers.

faqs.question: What mounting options are available for SMD Aluminum Capacitors?
faqs.answer: SMD Aluminum Capacitors are available in various mounting configurations including through-hole radial leads for PCB mounting, snap-in terminals for high-power applications, and screw terminals for very high capacitance values. The mounting style should be selected based on the mechanical requirements, current handling, and serviceability needs of your application.
faqs.decisionGuide: Review our mounting guidelines or contact our FAE team for recommendations on the best mounting style for your application.

faqs.question: How do ripple current and ESR affect SMD Aluminum Capacitors performance?
faqs.answer: Ripple current and ESR are critical parameters that affect capacitor heating and filtering performance. Higher ripple current causes increased self-heating due to I²R losses in the ESR. Lower ESR results in better filtering, lower ripple voltage, and reduced heating. When selecting SMD Aluminum Capacitors, ensure the ripple current rating exceeds your application requirements by at least 1.5x for reliable operation.
faqs.decisionGuide: For help calculating ripple current requirements and ESR specifications, contact our FAE team.

products.name: SMD Capacitor 100uF 16V
products.shortDescription: Surface-mount capacitor with 100uF capacitance and 16V rating for compact designs.
descriptionParagraphs: The VT-100uF-16V is a surface-mount aluminum electrolytic capacitor designed for compact electronic devices. With 100uF capacitance and 16V rating, it provides effective decoupling and filtering for low-voltage circuits.
This capacitor features a compact 6.3mm x 5.4mm SMD package with standard footprint. The surface-mount terminals enable automated assembly and reduce PCB space requirements.
Rated for 2000 hours at 85C, this capacitor is suitable for consumer electronics and portable devices. The reflow-compatible design ensures reliable soldering.
products.faeReview: The VT-100uF-16V is my go-to SMD capacitor for 5V and 3.3V decoupling applications. The compact 6.3mm size fits in tight spaces, and the reflow compatibility ensures reliable assembly. I use this extensively in adapter and charger designs. The 100uF value is perfect for output filtering in small power supplies.

alternativeParts.comparison: Voltage: 16V same; Capacitance: 68uF vs 100uF; Size: smaller package
Voltage: 16V same; Temperature: 105C vs 85C; Lifetime: 4000h vs 2000h

faqs.question: What is the maximum ripple current for the VT-100uF-16V?
faqs.answer: The rated ripple current is 0.24A at 85C and 120Hz. This rating ensures reliable operation in power supply applications with moderate switching frequencies. At lower temperatures, the capacitor can handle higher ripple currents - approximately 0.3A at 65C. For high-frequency applications above 100kHz, the effective ripple current capability may be reduced due to increased ESR. Always verify the actual operating temperature and frequency conditions in your application to ensure the capacitor operates within its safe operating area.
faqs.decisionGuide: For applications exceeding 0.24A ripple current, consider using multiple capacitors in parallel or upgrading to a higher capacitance model. Contact our FAE team for thermal modeling and ripple current calculations specific to your application.

faqs.question: What is the expected lifetime of the VT-100uF-16V at typical operating conditions?
faqs.answer: The rated lifetime is 2,000 hours at 85C. Using the Arrhenius equation, we can calculate the expected lifetime at different operating temperatures. At 65C, the expected lifetime extends to 8,000 hours. At 45C, lifetime increases to 32,000 hours. At 25C ambient, you can achieve up to 128,000 hours. Every 10C reduction in operating temperature approximately doubles the capacitor lifetime. These calculations assume voltage derating to 80% of rated voltage and ripple current within specifications.
faqs.decisionGuide: For maximum capacitor lifetime, operate at the lowest practical temperature with 80% voltage derating. Contact our FAE team for lifetime calculations specific to your application conditions.

faqs.question: What voltage derating is recommended for reliable operation of the VT-100uF-16V?
faqs.answer: Industry best practice recommends operating aluminum electrolytic capacitors at no more than 80% of their rated voltage. For this 16V rated capacitor, the maximum recommended operating voltage is 13V. This 20% derating significantly improves reliability and extends operational lifetime. For critical applications or high-temperature environments, 50% derating is recommended, limiting operating voltage to 8V. The voltage derating also provides margin for voltage transients and line regulation variations. Operating above 80% of rated voltage will significantly reduce capacitor lifetime.
faqs.decisionGuide: Design your circuit to operate the capacitor at 80% or less of rated voltage for optimal reliability. Contact our FAE team for voltage derating recommendations specific to your application requirements.

faqs.question: What is the operating temperature range of the VT-100uF-16V and how does it affect performance?
faqs.answer: This capacitor is rated for operation from -55C to +85C. At the maximum rated temperature of 85C, the capacitor achieves its rated lifetime of 2,000 hours. As operating temperature decreases, capacitor lifetime increases exponentially following the Arrhenius relationship - approximately doubling for every 10C reduction. Capacitance and ESR also vary with temperature, with capacitance typically increasing 10-15% at low temperatures and decreasing slightly at high temperatures. ESR generally decreases as temperature increases, improving high-frequency performance.
faqs.decisionGuide: For extended capacitor lifetime, minimize operating temperature through proper thermal design and ventilation. Contact our FAE team for thermal management recommendations specific to your application.

faqs.question: What is the ESR of the VT-100uF-16V and how does it affect circuit performance?
faqs.answer: The Equivalent Series Resistance (ESR) at 100Hz is approximately 0.08 Ohm. ESR represents the resistive losses in the capacitor and directly affects ripple voltage, power dissipation, and filtering effectiveness. Lower ESR results in lower ripple voltage for a given ripple current, reduced self-heating, and improved filtering at high frequencies. This capacitor's ESR characteristics make it suitable for switching power supplies and industrial controls. ESR typically decreases with increasing temperature and increases at higher frequencies. For switching power supplies operating at 100kHz, consider the frequency characteristics of ESR.
faqs.decisionGuide: For applications requiring lower ESR, consider our low-impedance series or connect multiple capacitors in parallel. Contact our FAE team for ESR optimization recommendations.

faqs.question: Can multiple VT-100uF-16V capacitors be connected in parallel for increased capability?
faqs.answer: Yes, multiple capacitors can be connected in parallel to increase total capacitance and share ripple current. When connecting VT-100uF-16V in parallel, the total capacitance adds linearly while ESR reduces proportionally. For example, two capacitors in parallel provide 200uF capacitance and approximately 0.040 Ohm ESR (half the single capacitor ESR). This configuration also improves ripple current capability to 0.5A. Important considerations include: using identical part numbers for balanced current sharing, maintaining symmetrical PCB layout, ensuring adequate spacing for thermal management, and verifying the total inrush current doesn't exceed circuit limitations.
faqs.decisionGuide: For high-current applications, consider parallel connection of multiple capacitors. Contact our FAE team for parallel capacitor bank design assistance and current sharing analysis.
